june-2026-release-notes.title: June 2026: AI Agent, New Swaps Engine & Nostr Relay
june-2026-release-notes.description: We built KaleidoMind, an on-device AI agent, and previewed it on desktop and a mobile alpha. We started rebuilding the swap engine in Rust. The node got more capable, and we launched our own Nostr relay.

nostr-relay-launch.title: KaleidoSwap Now Runs Its Own Nostr Relay
nostr-relay-launch.description: KaleidoSwap launched wss://relay.kaleidoswap.com, an open Nostr relay that powers wallet identity, app connections, and order discovery.

rgb-protocol.title: RGB Protocol on Bitcoin: History, Architecture, and How KaleidoSwap Fits in The Ecosystem
rgb-protocol.description: The history, architecture, and ecosystem of RGB Protocol on Bitcoin v0.11.1 — and what KaleidoSwap is building on top of it.

may-2026-release-notes.title: May 2026: Extension Mainnet Beta, Covenant DEX Rails, and Partner Admin Panel
may-2026-release-notes.description: The browser extension shipped its first mainnet beta, our covenant DEX work took shape across three settlement rails, Liquid integration began, and the RGB Lightning Node reached v0.7.0.

kaleidoagent-wdk-hackathon.title: KaleidoAgent: An Autonomous AI Agent for Bitcoin L2 via MCP
kaleidoagent-wdk-hackathon.description: KaleidoAgent executes Bitcoin and Lightning payments for AI agents via MCP servers. Trustless atomic swaps on Bitcoin L2 introduced in agentic payments.

april-2026-release-notes.title: April 2026: Desktop v0.4.0, SDK Fixes & CLI Improvements
april-2026-release-notes.description: April was a dense month of shipping. The Desktop App reached v0.4.0 with trading automation features. The SDK went through six patch releases. KaleidoCLI received a significant expansion of its command surface.

solving-bitcoin-l2-liquidity.title: Solving Bitcoin L2 Interoperability: A Multi-Protocol Lightning DEX
solving-bitcoin-l2-liquidity.description: KaleidoSwap unifies Bitcoin L2 liquidity with trustless atomic swaps across RGB, Taproot Assets, Liquid, Spark, and Arkade. One Lightning DEX for every protocol.

first-rgb-swap-mainnet.title: The First Bitcoin Atomic Swap of an RGB Asset on Lightning
first-rgb-swap-mainnet.description: KaleidoSwap executed the first Bitcoin atomic swap of an RGB asset on the Lightning Network, proving private, non-custodial trading on Bitcoin is real.

kaleidoswap-utexo.title: KaleidoSwap × UTEXO: USDT-BTC Swaps via RGB Lightning
kaleidoswap-utexo.description: KaleidoSwap integrates with UTEXO, the team behind the first RGB bridge, to bring fast, trustless BTC-USDT swaps with the privacy and self-custody guarantees of Bitcoin's infrastructure.

pre-seed-investment.title: KaleidoSwap Raises Pre-Seed for the First RGB-powered Lightning DEX
pre-seed-investment.description: KaleidoSwap has secured a pre-seed investment from Bitfinex Ventures and Fulgur Ventures to accelerate the development of the first RGB-based DEX on the Lightning Network.

introducing-rate.title: Introducing Rate: AI-Powered Self-Custodial RGB Lightning Wallet
introducing-rate.description: Rate brings multi-protocol Bitcoin payments through an AI-powered wallet engine. Users can interact with an AI agent to move sats and RGB assets via natural language or voice.

kaleidoswap-v020.title: KaleidoSwap v0.2.0: Non-Custodial RGB Swaps Live on Mainnet
kaleidoswap-v020.description: Non-custodial Bitcoin swaps with RGB assets: KaleidoSwap v0.2.0 ships as RGB v0.11.1 goes live on mainnet, offering a stronger Lightning infrastructure integration

rgb-taproot-atomic-swaps.title: RGB–TaprootAssets Lightning Atomic Swaps
rgb-taproot-atomic-swaps.description: A simple protocol for Bitcoin atomic swaps between RGB and Taproot Assets over the Lightning Network, enabling cross-L2 interoperability
